name: twg-skills
description: Agent skills for querying and managing Atlassian Teamwork Graph data using the twg cli

atlassian_site.title: Atlassian Site
atlassian_site.description: Your Atlassian site prefix (e.g. 'hello' for hello.atlassian.net)

bitbucket_token.title: Bitbucket Token (optional)
bitbucket_token.description: Bitbucket token for bb/PR commands — generate at https://id.atlassian.com/manage-profile/security/api-tokens?autofillToken=&appId=bitbucket&selectedScopes=all&expiryDays=30

rovo_mcp_token.title: Rovo MCP Token (optional)
rovo_mcp_token.description: Rovo MCP token for twg rovo search — generate at https://id.atlassian.com/manage-profile/security/api-tokens?autofillToken=&appId=mcp&selectedScopes=all&expiryDays=30
